prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM LFX 3.6L V6 (LFX)** with a **Forged Internals Kit by Manley** (86mm forged crank, H-beam connecting rods, and forged pistons) paired with a **Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger** (1.06 A/R turbine housing) and **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** for 550whp on **E85 fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** managing boost via a **custom 4-bar MAP sensor setup**.

Full **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Milltek Sport** (catless downpipe, 200-cell race catalytic converter, and resonated center section) with **Burns Stainless 304L merge collectors** and **Akrapovič titanium exhaust tips** for optimized scavenging and weight reduction.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Antara’s Z76 chassis)** paired with **SuperPro poly bushings (full kit: subframe, control arms, and sway bar)** and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)** to eliminate body roll and improve turn-in response.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (custom-fabricated for the Antara Cosmo’s Z76 platform)** with **carbon fiber fenders (dry carbon, 2x2 twill weave)** and **extended aluminum overfenders** to accommodate **20x10.5 ET15 Volk Racing TE37SL wheels** (matte bronze) with **265/35R20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires**.

**Custom front splitter by Varis Japan** (carbon fiber, 3-piece design with adjustable dive planes) and **rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon** (integrated with the Rocket Bunny rear bumper) to reduce lift by 30% at 120mph, validated via **wind tunnel testing at Yoshi Racing (Japan)**.

**Full interior carbon fiber overhaul by Status Racing** (door cards, center console, and dashboard trim in **gloss black 3K carbon fiber**) with **Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara, FIA-approved)** and **custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (T45 steel, 6-point, bolt-in)** painted in **RAL 2004 (Pure Orange)** to match the **PPG Opel Motorsport Rallye Yellow** exterior.
